about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Technology has fascinated me since childhood, and I have never stopped learning and trying to help businesses grow.
about.journeyText: Facinated by technology since 14 yo, having a knack to disamble appliances and put it all back together with less screws than before. I say that was a skill, my parents thought otherwise. I like to be on the creative side of engineering, and like many so many ideas come to mind that is hard to complete them all, but here we are on this journey to try and fail and try again.
careerGoals: Mentor junior developers and share knowledge through content
Explore cutting-edge technologies like AI/ML integration
Leading teams to reach their full potential
